zh.lifeSummary: 當William Latimer於大約1220年出生在英國越可爾斯坎普斯頓時，他的父親William I Latimer21歲，母親Mayla Lane39歲。他於1239年與Alice Hansard在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾斯托克 吉福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1268年11月22日在英國越可爾享年49歲。

nameMeanings.name: Latimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a Latinist, a clerk who wrote documents in Latin, from Anglo-Norman French latinier, latim(m)ier. Latin was more or less the universal language of official documents in the Middle Ages, displaced only gradually by the vernacular – in England, by Anglo-Norman French at first, and eventually by English.

variants.name: Latner
meanings: English: occupational name for a worker in or maker of latten or brass, from Middle English latoun ‘brass’ (Old French laton). This name may sometimes have been confused with Latimer .
Altered form of German   Lattner   or   Lettner  .

variants.name: Lattner
meanings: German: occupational name for a carpenter who prepared or used laths or slats, from Middle High German latte ‘slat, lath’ + -n (plural suffix) + the agent suffix -er.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When William Latimer was born about 1220, in Scampston, Yorkshire, England, his father, William I Latimer, was 21 and his mother, Mayla Lane, was 39. He married Alice Hansard in 1239, in Stoke Gifford, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 22 November 1268, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Latimer est né environ 1220, à Scampston, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William I Latimer, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mayla Lane, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Alice Hansard en 1239, à Stoke Gifford, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 22 novembre 1268, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William Latimerが約1220年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスカンプストンで生まれた時，父William I Latimerは21歳，母Mayla Laneは39歳であった。1239年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアストク ギフォードでAlice Hansardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1268年11月22日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Latimer(이)가 대략 1220년 영국 요르크실르 스캠프스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William I Latimer(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mayla Lane(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1239년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 스토크 지퍼드에서 Alice Hansard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1268년 11월 22일 영국 요르크실르에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Latimer родился около 1220 г. в местности скампстон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William I Latimer было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mayla Lane, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Hansard в 1239 г. в местности сток гиффорд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 22 ноября 1268 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет.
